name: Zrok
description: Zrok — Open-source ngrok alternative with WireGuard-based tunnels, token authentication, and self-hostable control plane.

seo.title: Zrok — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Zrok: Zrok — Open-source ngrok alternative with WireGuard-based tunnels, token authentication, and self-hostable control plane.

when_to_use: WireGuard-based self-hostable ngrok alternative for teams
Token-authenticated tunnel for secure localhost exposure
Webhook receiver for local development without port forwarding
Private tunnel sharing for internal demo environments
Zero-trust tunnel with access policy enforcement per share

cons: Not a secrets manager, category mismatch
Docs still catching up to features
review.verdict: A strong self-hostable ngrok alternative; categorizing it under secrets management is misleading.
review.best_for: Teams wanting self-hosted, zero-trust-backed tunneling for dev and services.
review.not_for: Teams looking for a secrets vault or credential store.
